productDisplayName: Puma Men MC II Grey Tshirts
description: Composition Grey round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with graphic print on the front Fit Comfort Wash care Machine was cold Wash separately Do not use softeners, bleach, iron or dry clean Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Line dry German brand puma specialises in minimalism and simplicity. This t-shirt from puma with its angular silhouette and fabric falls neatly over your shoulders. Simple and classy, pair this piece with fitted denims and casual shoes.
